message:
chore: regenerate phase2c compat-closure attestation and evidence pack

Re-run the compat-closure attestation pipeline, which updates the
generated timestamp and recomputes content-addressed hashes for the
FP-P2C-001 parity report artifacts (decode_proof, main report, and
raptorq sub-report). The coverage remains at 100 % with strict zero
drift and all checks still passing.

Specific changes:
- `compat_closure_attestation_summary.json`: bump `generated_unix_ms`
  from 1771448786034 to 1771471742793 and update the
  `attestation_signature` SHA-256 to reflect the new evidence pack
  contents.
- `compat_closure_final_evidence_pack.json`: same timestamp bump,
  updated SHA-256 fingerprints for three FP-P2C-001 parity report
  files whose underlying data changed in the latest test run, and
  updated final attestation signature to match.

No behavioral or coverage changes — this is a routine re-attestation
after upstream parity report content was refreshed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

   "coverage_percent": 100,
   "strict_zero_drift": true,

 }
